model.title: Select Bedrock Model
model.description: Pick a Claude inference profile available in your account.

error.access_denied: Access denied. Check your IAM permissions

abort.already_configured: Bedrock Home Assistant Agent is already configured

data.auto_attach_cameras: Attach exposed camera snapshots to each turn
data.expose_areas_only: Only expose devices in these areas (empty = all exposed)
data.max_prompt_tokens: Max tokens in device list (0 = uncapped)

data_description.image_model_id: Bedrock model used by the AI Task image-generation service. Leave empty to disable image generation. Supported families: Amazon Nova Canvas, Amazon Titan Image Generator, Stability AI (SD3.5 / SDXL).
data_description.enable_config_editing: Allow Claude to propose changes to automations, scripts, scenes, helpers, Lovelace dashboards, areas, and labels. Changes require your confirmation before they apply.
data_description.config_undo_depth: How many recent config changes to keep in the in-memory undo stack per conversation.
data_description.config_undo_ttl_seconds: Seconds an undo entry stays available before expiry.
data_description.config_approval_ttl_seconds: Seconds a pending change waits for your approval before it expires.
data_description.enable_diagnostics: Allow Claude to read logs, query state/history, call a broader service allowlist, and perform lifecycle operations (reload integrations, enable/disable entities, check config, set logger levels). Destructive operations still require your explicit approval. Off by default.
data_description.diagnostics_log_max_lines: Hard cap on the number of log entries returned to the model per call (default 50, max 500).
data_description.diagnostics_history_max_hours: Hard cap on the history lookback window per call (default 24, max 168 = one week).
data_description.diagnostics_call_budget_per_turn: Maximum number of diagnostic tool calls Claude can make in a single conversation turn (default 3, max 10). Prevents runaway log-dump or state-scan loops.

haiku_config_advisory.title: Bedrock Home Assistant Agent: Model advisory
haiku_config_advisory.message: Config editing works best on Claude Sonnet 4.5 or Opus; Haiku may truncate large dashboards.

conversation_responses.approval_expired: That change expired; please ask again if you still want it.
conversation_responses.undo_nothing_to_undo_for_conversation: Nothing to undo for this conversation.
conversation_responses.undo_ambiguous: I have pending undo history in more than one conversation. Pass `conversation_id` to disambiguate.
conversation_responses.apply_failed_restored: Sorry — that change failed to apply and I've rolled it back. Error: {error}

undo_last_config_change.name: Undo last config change
undo_last_config_change.description: Revert the most recent config change made by the conversation agent. Uses an in-memory undo stack (cleared on restart).

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: Which Bedrock integration entry to target. Optional when you only have one.

conversation_id.name: Conversation ID
conversation_id.description: Which conversation's undo stack to pop. Optional unless more than one conversation has pending undo state.
